pg12-p1-s2: He was on a different footing.
pg12-p1-s3: His roots grasped a new soil.
pg12-p1: reorganized. He was on a different footing. His roots grasped a new soil.
pg12-p2-s1: Despite the living example of my friend there remained in me the vestiges of my old prejudice.
pg12-p2-s2:
The word God still
aroused a certain antipathy.
pg12-p2-s3:
When the thought was expressed that there might be a God personal to me this feeling was
intensified.
pg12-p2-s5:
I could go for such conceptions as Creative Intelligence, Universal Mind or Spirit
of Nature but I resisted the thought of a Czar of the Heavens, however loving His sway might be.
pg12-p2-s6:
I have since talked
with scores of men who felt the same way.
pg12-p2:
Despite the living example of my friend there remained in me the vestiges of my old prejudice. The word God still
aroused a certain antipathy. When the thought was expressed that there might be a God personal to me this feeling was
intensified. I didn't like the idea. I could go for such conceptions as Creative Intelligence, Universal Mind or Spirit
of Nature but I resisted the thought of a Czar of the Heavens, however loving His sway might be. I have since talked
with scores of men who felt the same way.
pg12-p3-s1: My friend suggested what then seemed a novel idea.
pg12-p3-s2: He said, "Why don't you choose your own conception of God?"
pg12-p3: My friend suggested what then seemed a novel idea. He said, "Why don't you choose your own conception of God?"
pg12-p4-s2: It melted the icy intellectual mountain in whose shadow I had lived and shivered many years.
pg12-p4-s3: I stood in the sunlight at last.
pg12-p4: That statement hit me hard. It melted the icy intellectual mountain in whose shadow I had lived and shivered many years. I stood in the sunlight at last.
pg12-p5-s1: It was only a matter of being willing to believe in a Power greater than myself.
pg12-p5-s2:
Nothing more was required of me to
make my beginning. I saw that growth could start from that point.
pg12-p5-s3:
Upon a foundation of complete willingness I might
build what I saw in my friend.
pg12-p5:
It was only a matter of being willing to believe in a Power greater than myself. Nothing more was required of me to
make my beginning. I saw that growth could start from that point. Upon a foundation of complete willingness I might
build what I saw in my friend. Would I have it? Of course I would!
pg12-p6-s1: Thus was I convinced that God is concerned with us humans when we want Him enough.
pg12-p6-s2:
At long last I saw, I felt, I
believed.
pg12-p6-s3: Scales of pride and prejudice fell from my eyes.
pg12-p6-s4: A new world came into view.
pg12-p6:
Thus was I convinced that God is concerned with us humans when we want Him enough. At long last I saw, I felt, I
believed. Scales of pride and prejudice fell from my eyes. A new world came into view.
pg12-p7-s1: The real significance of my experience in the Cathedral burst upon me.
pg12-p7-s2: For a brief moment, I had needed and wanted God.
pg12-p7-s3: There had been a humble willingness to have Him with me - and He came.
pg12-p7-s4:
But soon the sense of His presence had been
blotted out by
pg12-p7:
The real significance of my experience in the Cathedral burst upon me. For a brief moment, I had needed and wanted God. There had been a humble willingness to have Him with me - and He came. But soon the sense of His presence had been
blotted out by
